description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Template for Custom Board Build that accepts a string input args. The workflow runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs Python 3.11 and UV, then installs PlatformIO build dependencies. It performs a pre-build to ensure the ~/.platformio/boards folder exists, copies a custom board JSON file to the folder, and builds FastLED examples with the provided args. The workflow uploads build artifacts and logs on failure and checks the build status.
